creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
I tried, but could not reproduce this on FreeBSD 11, and neither the
ports cluster nor any other user has reported anything like this.

Do you have any special configuration (settings, packages, build
options,...)?

What does `/usr/local/sbin/pkg info | grep iconv` show?

And what `setenv | grep ^L`?

And this is amd64 aka x86-64 (not same flavor of ARM), correct?
